results.title: PNB Signs MoU with MCD to Enable Digital Payments via BBPS in Delhi
results.description: Punjab National Bank has signed an MoU with the Municipal Corporation of Delhi to enable seamless digital payment collections through BBPS, strengthening the city’s digital governance and payment ecosystem.

results.title: Advit Jewels IPO Last Day: GMP At 38%, Issue Subscribed 63x So Far; Should You Apply? Know Price, Recommendation
results.description: Advit Jewels IPO GMP: Unlisted shares of Advit Jewels trade at Rs 190 apiece in the grey market, which is 37.6% grey market premium over the upper IPO price of Rs 138.
